final:
module JK_latch (
    input J,
    input K,
    input clk,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (J == 1 && K == 0) begin
            Q <= 1; // Set
        end
        else if (J == 0 && K == 1) begin
            Q <= 0; // Reset
        end
        else if (J == 1 && K == 1) begin
            Q <= ~Q; // Toggle
        end
        // If J == 0 and K == 0, Q remains unchanged
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (J == 0 && K == 0) begin
        Q <= 1;
      end
      else if (J == 1 && K == 0) begin
        Q <= 0;
      end
      else if (J == 0 && K == 1) begin
        Q <= ~Q;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
